reddit_context: Village in Romania where it's mandatory to keep the tradition of painting houses.
Ursul, The Bear Dance Festival, is a ritual that symbolizes the death and rebirth of time. A tradition, preserved since ancient times that is still kept alive today (Comanesti, Romania).
